mapper.sql: sc.id, sc.coach_id, sc.store_id, sc.weekday, DATE_FORMAT(sc.start_time,'%H:%i') as startTime, DATE_FORMAT(sc.end_time,'%H:%i') as endTime, sc.is_enabled, sc.created_by, sc.created_at, sc.updated_by, sc.updated_at, (select storeName from store where storeId = sc.store_id) as storeName
mapper.select: select from pt_coach_schedule sc where sc.id = #{value}
mapper.delete:
delete from pt_coach_schedule where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from pt_coach_store_rel where coach_id = #{coachId} and store_id = #{storeId}

select count(distinct s.coach_id) from pt_coach_schedule s inner join pt_coach c on c.id = s.coach_id and c.status = 1 and c.deleted = 0 where s.is_enabled = 1 and s.store_id in (${storeIds})
AND s.coach_id in (${coachIdsFilter})
